src_raw: 2016年的全球政經舞台上「黑天鵝」身影頻仍，英國脫歐公投和美國總統大選結果固然令各種民調淪為笑柄，但更出乎意料的卻是金融市場的反應。以美國大選為例，特朗普當選消息令美股三大指數的期貨在開市前急挫，但開市不久美股指數隨即反彈，此後凱歌高奏，屢創新高。連串事件，凸顯了傳統智慧和思維對預測市場能力的局限性，也標誌着未來環球局勢發展的重大不確定性。
mt_raw: In 2016, “black swans” frequently appeared on the global political and economic stage. While the Brexit referendum and the U.S. presidential election results made various polls appear laughable, even more surprising was the reaction of the financial markets. Take the U.S. election as an example: news of Trump’s victory caused major U.S. stock index futures to plunge sharply before markets opened, but shortly after opening, the stock indices rebounded, subsequently reaching new highs with triumphant celebrations. These series of events highlight the limitations of traditional wisdom and thinking in predicting market movements, and mark significant uncertainties in the future development of the global situation.

src_raw: 過去一年，多項主要金融數據都反映市場情緒異常敏感：美國十年期國庫債券收益率在7月跌至1.36厘歷史低位後，在美國總統大選後的12月中旬飆升至2.6厘。反映美元兌一籃子貨幣走勢的美匯指數在年底升至14年高位；紐約原油期貨價格由年初每桶26美元低位反彈至年底的54美元。本港股市方面，恒生指數全年微升86點，但期內峰谷差逾6,000點。外圍形勢驚濤駭浪，更形金融體系尤其是貨幣和銀行體系穩定的重要和可貴。
mt_raw: Over the past year, many key financial data reflected an abnormally sensitive market sentiment: after the U.S. ten-year Treasury yield hit a record low of 1.36% in July, it shot up to 2.6% in mid-December following the U.S. presidential election. The USD index, which reflects the trend of the U.S. dollar against a basket of currencies, rose to a 14-year high at the end of the year; meanwhile, crude oil futures prices rebounded from a low of US$26 per barrel at the beginning of the year to US$54 at year-end. In our local stock market, the Hang Seng Index saw a marginal increase of 86 points for the whole year, but within the period, the peak-to-trough difference exceeded 6,000 points. External shocks and tumultuous conditions further underscore the importance and preciousness of the stability of the financial system, particularly the monetary and banking sectors.

src_raw: 2016年1月，國際對沖基金部署狙擊人民幣和港元的傳言甚囂塵上，人心虛怯。金管局迅即向市場發放明確、堅定的訊息，我們絕對有信心、有能力捍衛聯匯制度和香港的金融體系穩定，適時穩住了市場信心。綜觀2016年全年，港元長時間貼近強方兌換保證。由於銀行體系資金非常充裕，即使去年12月和今年3月美國聯儲局加息，對港元利率和匯率並未有明顯的即時影響。
mt_raw: In January 2016, rumours ran rampant about international hedge funds deploying strategies to target the renminbi and Hong Kong dollar, causing widespread panic. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority promptly issued clear and firm messages to the market: we are confident and capable of defending the Linked Exchange Rate System and the stability of Hong Kong’s financial system, thus stabilizing market confidence in a timely manner. Throughout 2016, the Hong Kong dollar remained close to the strong-side convertibility undertaking. Due to ample liquidity in the banking system, even with the U.S. Federal Reserve raising interest rates in December last year and in March this year, there was no obvious immediate impact on the Hong Kong dollar interest rates or exchange rate.

terms: {'不良貸款比率': 'classified loan ratio', '整體貸款': 'Total loans', '樓宇按揭業務': 'mortgage lending business', '樓市周期': 'property market cycle', '法定要求': 'statutory minimum requirements', '流動性比率': 'liquidity ratios', '資本充足率': 'capital adequacy ratios', '資產質素': 'asset quality', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行體系': 'banking system', '銀行體系穩定': 'Banking Stability', '香港': 'Hong Kong'}
src_raw: 香港銀行體系繼續穩步發展，去年整體貸款錄得6.5%溫和增長，資產質素保持良好，不良貸款比率維持在0.85%的健康水平，遠低於2000年以來約2%的長期平均水平。銀行體系的資本充足率和流動性比率均保持在高於法定要求的高水平。在樓宇按揭業務方面，經過七輪逆周期措施，新造住宅物業按揭平均成數從2009年9月的64%下降至2016年底的51%，平均供款與入息比率也從2010年8月的41%下降至2016年底的34%，為樓市周期一旦逆轉而令銀行體系受到衝擊時，提供了所需的緩衝。金管局會繼續密切留意樓市的發展，因應周期變化而採取合適措施，以保持銀行體系穩定。
mt_raw: The banking sector continued to develop steadily. Overall loans grew modestly by 6.5% last year, with asset quality maintained at a good level; non-performing loan ratio remained at a healthy 0.85%, well below the long-term average of about 2% since 2000. Capital adequacy and liquidity ratios also remained at high levels above statutory requirements. In the property mortgage sector, after seven rounds of countercyclical measures, the average loan-to-value ratio for new residential properties declined from 64% in September 2009 to 51% at the end of 2016, and the average debt-service ratio also decreased from 41% in August 2010 to 34% at year-end, providing buffers against potential shocks when the property cycle turns. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority will continue to closely monitor the property market development and adopt appropriate measures according to the cycle’s changes to maintain banking system stability.

terms: {'存款保障制度': 'Deposit Protection Scheme', '立法會': 'Legislative Council', '處置機制': 'resolution regime', '處置機制辦公室': 'Resolution office', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行體系': 'banking system', '銀行體系穩定': 'Banking Stability'}
src_raw: 進一步強化銀行體系穩定的立法工作去年取得令人鼓舞的進展。優化存款保障制度和針對金融機構「大得不能倒」風險的兩條法例，及時在上屆立法會任期屆滿前順利通過。前者加快存款保障金的發放速度，簡化發放程序，有助加強存戶對銀行體系的信心；後者則為包括銀行在內的金融機構建立處置機制，防範這些機構一旦倒閉而引發的系統性金融風險，並盡量避免動用公帑為它們「包底埋單」。金管局已在今年4月1日設立處置機制辦公室，落實執行法例的要求和跟進工作。
mt_raw: Legislative progress last year further strengthened the stability of the banking system. The two laws aimed at optimising the deposit protection scheme and establishing resolution mechanisms to prevent “too big to fail” risks for financial institutions were approved in a timely manner before the previous Legislative Council term ended. The former accelerates the disbursement of deposit protection funds and simplifies procedures, which helps bolster depositors’ confidence in the banking system. The latter provides a resolution framework for financial institutions, including banks, to guard against systemic risks caused by their potential insolvency and to reduce reliance on public funds for bailouts. The HKMA established the Resolution Office on April 1 this year to ensure the proper implementation of the legal requirements and ongoing follow-up work.

src_raw: 銀行業素有「百業之母」之稱，是實體經濟和普羅市民日常生活倚重的儲蓄、支付渠道和信貸來源。年內，部分中小企業界代表反映融資有困難。金管局即時與銀行界溝通，希望銀行在維持審慎風險管理的情況下，盡可能為中小企的營運和發展繼續提供資金支援。我們又透過轄下香港按揭證券公司，加強向工商界推廣政府的「中小企融資擔保計劃」，並與銀行業界緊密溝通，以釋除疑慮、釐清誤解及理順處理壞帳的索償程序，從而提高銀行參與該計劃的意願。多管齊下，收到了一定成效，根據金管局對銀行進行的調查，中小企整體信貸額度在去年保持平穩，超過九成企業的信貸額度得以維持甚至增加。同時，「中小企融資擔保計劃」的申請數字亦明顯上升。
mt_raw: Banks are known as the “mother of all industries,” as they are vital to the real economy and the daily lives of ordinary citizens—serving as the main channels for savings, payments, and credit needs. During the year, some representative of small and medium enterprises (SMEs) expressed concerns over financing difficulties. The HKMA immediately engaged in communication with the banking sector, encouraging banks to continue to support SME operations and development while maintaining prudent risk management. We also promoted the Government’s “SME Financing Guarantee Scheme” through the HKMC and worked closely with banks to allay concerns, clarify procedures for claims on bad debts, and streamline processes, thereby increasing banks’ willingness to participate. These efforts have achieved certain results: a survey conducted by the HKMA showed that overall SME credit limits remained stable last year, with over 90% of enterprises maintaining or even increasing their credit limits. Meanwhile, the number of applications under the scheme also increased significantly.

src_raw: 近年來金管局大力推動普及金融，就是考慮到基本銀行服務已是營商和日常生活不可或缺的環節。去年當我們得知有些海外公司和初創企業在香港開戶遇到困難後，旋即展開跟進工作，與多個國際商會和企業協會聯繫，並跟銀行業界深入溝通，對症下藥。去年9月我向香港所有銀行簽發通告，闡釋應如何理解金管局針對反洗錢和恐怖分子資金籌集活動的「風險為本」監管原則，如何將這項原則應用在開戶申請和對現有客戶的盡職審查措施上，強調銀行不應對所有客戶採用「一刀切」的要求和程序。經我們與銀行和商界協商後，企業開戶情況有所改善，但仍有進步空間，這也是我們今年工作重點之一。
mt_raw: In recent years, the HKMA has vigorously promoted financial inclusion, recognizing that basic banking services are essential for businesses and daily life. After learning that some overseas companies and startups faced difficulties opening accounts in Hong Kong, we promptly followed up by contacting multiple chambers of commerce and business associations, and working closely with the banking sector to resolve issues. In September last year, I issued a notice to all banks in Hong Kong, explaining how to interpret and apply the “risk-based” regulatory principles in anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing activities—especially in account opening and customer due diligence procedures—emphasizing that banks should not adopt a “one size fits all” approach for every customer. After negotiations with the banking sector and trade associations, the situation has improved, although there remains room for further enhancement, which will be one of our focuses this year.

src_raw: 普及金融還涉及銀行分行服務的覆蓋面。金管局一直鼓勵銀行在營商圖利之餘，也要顧及市民的基本銀行服務需要。金融科技一日千里，銀行提供服務的渠道也更趨多元化。除了日益普及的網上銀行服務外，去年多家銀行紛紛推出流動銀行車或視像櫃員機服務，提供較傳統櫃員機更貼身、更全面的銀行服務。在我們的推動下，多家銀行也計劃在偏遠地區設立實體分行，加強對當區居民的服務。
mt_raw: Financial inclusion also pertains to expanding the coverage of banking services through branch networks. The HKMA has been encouraging banks to balance profit motives with citizens’ basic banking needs. With the rapid development of financial technology, service channels are becoming more diverse. In addition to increasingly popular online banking, many banks introduced mobile branches and video teller machines last year to provide more personalized and comprehensive banking services. Under our promotion, several banks also plan to set up physical branches in remote areas to better serve local residents.

mt_raw: As an international financial centre, Hong Kong’s development is like sailing against the current—the pursuit of new opportunities has been ongoing for many years. In 2016, this effort bore fruitful results, especially in financial technology (Fintech) and infrastructure financing.

src_raw: 在金融科技方面，香港的零售支付服務在2016年進入新時代。金管局去年發出13個儲值支付工具牌照，通過發牌和恒常監管制度為零售支付服務創造有利的營商環境，配以一系列公眾教育宣傳，讓消費者在享受新科技帶來的便捷之餘，權益也得到合理保障。
mt_raw: In the Fintech domain, Hong Kong’s retail payment services entered a new era in 2016. The HKMA issued 13 stored value facilities licenses last year, creating a conducive environment for retail payment service providers through licensing and the ongoing regulatory regime, complemented by a series of public education campaigns. This ensures consumers enjoy the convenience brought by new technology while their rights are protected.

src_raw: 此外，去年3月金管局成立了金融科技促進辦公室，以此平台推動與銀行業相關的金融科技發展。幾個月間，我們推出多項新猷，包括「網絡防衛計劃」(Cybersecurity Fortification Initiative)，為強化銀行體系網絡安全建立風險評估、資訊共享和人才培訓三足鼎立的新平台。我們並與香港應用科技研究院（應科院）合作，開展分布式分類帳技術(distributed ledger technology)專項研究，探討該技術在香港銀行業應用的可行性，並在應科院設立金融科技創新中心(Fintech Innovation Hub)，為銀行業界和金融科技界提供技術支援。金管局的銀行監管部門還設立「金融科技監管沙盒」(Fintech Supervisory Sandbox)，讓銀行在較小和可控範圍內測試新技術的應用，為新產品、新服務的開發提速。自去年9月至今年3月，已有6家銀行共14項新技術項目使用沙盒進行測試，部分項目亦已相繼推出市場，為市民帶來更多金融科技的新產品。
mt_raw: Additionally, in March last year, the HKMA established the Fintech Facilitation Office as a platform to promote related developments in banking. Several new initiatives were launched within months, including the Cybersecurity Fortification Initiative, which established a tripartite platform for risk assessment, information sharing, and talent training to strengthen the cybersecurity of the banking system. We also collaborated with the Hong Kong Applied Science and Technology Research Institute (ASTRI) to carry out research on distributed ledger technology, exploring its feasibility for application in Hong Kong’s banking sector, and established the Fintech Innovation Hub to support technological development in the industry. The HKMA’s banking supervision department also set up a Fintech Supervisory Sandbox, allowing banks to test new technologies on a smaller and controlled scale, thereby accelerating the development of new products and services. From September last year to March this year, six banks conducted tests on 14 new technology projects within the sandbox, with some projects already launched to the market, bringing new fintech products to citizens.

src_raw: 世界各地對基建融資的需求巨大，特別是「一帶一路」倡議提出以來，基建融資更成中外矚目的議題。香港是亞洲的國際金融中心，在基建融資領域極具優勢。去年7月金管局成立了基建融資促進辦公室(Infrastructure Financing Facilitation Office，簡稱IFFO)，搭建一個嶄新和獨特的平台，匯聚60多家世界級的多邊機構、機構投資者、銀行、保險公司和其他金融機構、基建項目的建設和營運方、各類專業機構等，就基建投融資課題互通訊息、交流經驗、尋求合作機會。IFFO成立至今已舉辦十多場大型會議、研討會和工作坊，金管局並分別與國際金融公司(International Finance Corporation)、全球基礎設施中心(Global Infrastructure Hub)、國家開發銀行(China Development Bank)和中國進出口銀行(The Export-Import Bank of China)簽署了共同促進基建投融資活動的《諒解備忘錄》。起步時間雖然不長，但為香港未來作為基建投融資中心奠下堅實的基礎。
mt_raw: Globally, there is an enormous demand for infrastructure financing—especially since the “Belt and Road” Initiative has garnered international attention. Hong Kong, as Asia’s international financial hub, has distinct advantages in this area. In July last year, the HKMA established the Infrastructure Financing Facilitation Office (IFFO), creating a unique platform to connect more than 60 world-class multilateral agencies, institutional investors, banks, insurance companies, other financial institutions, infrastructure project developers and operators, and professional service providers to exchange information, share experiences, and seek cooperation on infrastructure investment and financing. Since its inception, IFFO has held over ten major conferences, seminars, and workshops. The HKMA has also signed memoranda of understanding with the International Finance Corporation, Global Infrastructure Hub, China Development Bank, and the Export-Import Bank of China to jointly promote infrastructure investment and financing activities. Although still in its early stages, these efforts lay a solid foundation for Hong Kong’s future role as an infrastructure financing centre.

src_raw: 拆牆鬆綁是提升競爭力的不二法門。年內，金管局積極參與和支援特區政府修訂稅務條例，向在港經營集團內部財資業務的企業提供有利的稅務環境。我們並積極接觸跨國企業，吸引它們來港發展或擴充企業財資活動，藉此進一步強化香港金融市場的功能。
mt_raw: Removing barriers is a key to enhancing competitiveness. During the year, the HKMA actively participated in and supported the SAR Government’s amendments to the tax law, aiming to create a favourable tax environment for enterprises operating in Hong Kong’s corporate treasury business. We also proactively engaged with multinational companies to attract them to develop or expand their treasury activities here, further strengthening the function of Hong Kong’s financial market.

src_raw: 去年的離岸人民幣市場處於調整期。受市場波動和對人民幣匯率預期等因素影響，全球離岸人民幣資金池規模普遍收縮。儘管如此，香港仍穩執離岸人民幣業務的牛耳，保持全球最大的人民幣資金池，經香港結算的人民幣維持在日均約8,600億元人民幣高位。為進一步優化香港離岸人民幣市場的流動性安排，去年10月我們將一級流動性提供行由7家增至9家，支援雙邊流動資金的總額度由原來的140億元人民幣增至180億元，確保在離岸人民幣市場資金出現緊絀的情況下，仍可保持市場有序運作。去年12月股票市場「深港通」開通，令香港的人民幣業務再添動力。金管局亦正與內地有關當局研究「債券通」方案，進一步便利兩地投資者參與債券市場，並優化債券市場基礎設施的聯繫。
mt_raw: Last year, the offshore renminbi market experienced a period of adjustment. Due to market volatility and expectations concerning the renminbi’s exchange rate, the size of the offshore renminbi liquidity pool contracted globally. Nevertheless, Hong Kong maintained its position as the world’s largest renminbi offshore hub, with the renminbi traded through Hong Kong maintaining an average daily volume of approximately RMB 8.6 trillion, remaining at a high level. To further optimize liquidity arrangements in Hong Kong’s offshore renminbi market, we increased the number of primary liquidity providers from seven to nine last October, raising the total support capacity for bilateral liquidity to RMB 18 billion, ensuring market orderly operation even when offshore renminbi liquidity tightens. The “Shenzhen-Hong Kong Stock Connect” program was launched in December last year, injecting fresh momentum into Hong Kong’s renminbi business. The HKMA is also working with mainland authorities on the “Bond Connect” scheme to facilitate bond market participation and connect infrastructure.

src_raw: 外匯基金將繼續推動多元化投資，包括進一步擴展資產類別，加大對於信貸資產、抵禦通脹類投資產品和新興市場的投資。而作為多元化投資旗艦的「長期增長組合」，透過私募股權和房地產項目等投資於另類資產。該組合自2009年啟動以來一直保持不俗的成績，成立至今的平均內部回報率年率約12%，而隨着政府「未來基金」部分投放於該組合，我們加快了投資步伐，去年底「長期增長組合」的資產規模約1,818億港元，已批出但未提取作投資的總額約1,338億港元。外匯基金將繼續恪守「保本先行、長期增值」的投資策略，在保持充裕的流動性和備用資金的前提下，尋求長遠穩定的回報。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund will continue to promote diversified investments, including expanding asset classes, increasing holdings of credit assets, inflation-linked investment products, and investments in emerging markets. The flagship “Long-Term Growth Portfolio,” which involves investments in alternative assets such as private equity and real estate, has performed remarkably since its inception in 2009, with an average annual internal rate of return of about 12%. As the government has allocated part of the “Future Fund” into this portfolio, we have accelerated our investment pace. By the end of last year, the asset size of the “Long-Term Growth Portfolio” reached approximately HK$181.8 billion, with an outstanding committed but unexercised investment amount of about HK$133.8 billion. The Exchange Fund will uphold the principle of “capital preservation first, long-term value growth next,” maintaining ample liquidity and reserves while seeking long-term stable returns.

src_raw: 香港經濟增長在2016年放緩，實質本地生產總值增長由2015年的2.4%降至1.9%（表1）。淨出口是主要拖累，當中訪港旅遊業疲弱令服務輸出受壓（圖1）。本地需求動力亦放緩，但繼續為整體經濟增長提供主要支持。勞工市場大致保持穩定，失業率維持於3.3至3.4%的低位。由於本地成本及外部價格壓力減退，消費物價通脹進一步放緩。面對波動的外圍環境及多變的市場氣氛，資產市場增添起伏。鑑於住宅物業市場再度暢旺，政府於11月實施新印花稅措施。
mt_raw: Hong Kong's economic growth slowed in 2016, with real local GDP growth decreasing from 2.4% in 2015 to 1.9% (Table 1). Net exports were the main drag, notably with weak arrivals tourism depressing service exports (Figure 1). Domestic demand also decelerated but continued to support overall economic growth. The labor market remained broadly stable, with the unemployment rate at a low 3.3% to 3.4%. Due to easing pressures on local costs and external prices, consumer price inflation further slowed. Amid volatile external conditions and variable market sentiment, asset markets experienced fluctuations. Thanks to a robust rebound in the residential property market, the government implemented new stamp duty measures in November.

src_raw: 儘管外圍環境波動及美元利率上升，本港外匯及貨幣市場繼續運作暢順。港元現貨匯率於1月份略為轉弱後一直在7.75附近水平徘徊。年內兌換保證並無被觸發，總結餘與未償還外匯基金票據及債券合計幾乎維持不變，約為1.2萬億港元。繼美國於12月中加息後，金管局基本利率由0.75厘上調至1厘。香港銀行同業拆息及較長期債券收益率維持在相對較低水平，但在接近年底時稍升，部分反映美元相應拆息及收益率的走勢。整體銀行貸款增長在2016年加快至6.5%。雖然整體貸款質素略為轉差，但特定分類貸款比率仍然維持在極低水平。
mt_raw: Despite external volatility and rising U.S. interest rates, the Hong Kong dollar and currency markets continued to function smoothly. The HKD spot exchange rate weakened slightly in January and then hovered around 7.75. No exchange guarantee was triggered during the year. The total reserves balance combined with outstanding Exchange Fund paper and bonds remained stable at about HK$1.2 trillion. Following the U.S. rate hike in mid-December, the HKMA's base rate was increased from 0.75% to 1%. Hong Kong interbank lending rates and yields on longer-term bonds remained at relatively low levels but rose slightly toward year-end, partly reflecting movements in U.S. interest rates and yields. Overall bank lending growth accelerated to 6.5% in 2016. Although loan quality slightly declined, the proportion of classified loans remained at very low levels.

mt_raw: Inflationary pressures remained controlled in 2016. Excluding the impact of one-off government relief measures, core inflation decreased from 2.5% in 2015 to 2.3% in 2016 (Figure 4). Conversely, moderate growth in labor costs and easing rent pressures—especially in retail—kept domestic costs relatively mild.

src_raw: 香港股市在2016年大幅上落。受到人民幣貶值壓力及內地股市波動所影響，恒生指數於2月份跌至3年來的低位（圖6）。本港股市在3月份跟隨美國及其他主要股市顯著造好而回升。儘管英國脫歐公投觸發市場波動，但在外界預期美國聯邦儲備局會放緩加息步伐及其他主要央行推行貨幣寬鬆政策下，市場氣氛迅速改善。恒生指數於9月份升至24,100點的一年高位。然而，受到美國總統選舉結果及預計美國會加快加息步伐所影響，本港股市在第4季再度受壓。整體而言，恒生指數於2016年微升0.4%，在2015年則下跌7.2%。平均每日成交額由上年的1,056億港元降至669億港元，而本港股市集資總額亦由上年的11,156億港元減少至4,901億港元。
mt_raw: Hong Kong shares experienced substantial volatility in 2016. Pressure from renminbi depreciation and mainland stock market fluctuations pushed the Hang Seng Index down to a three-year low in February (Figure 6). In March, the market rebounded significantly following the recovery of U.S. and other major markets. Despite market turbulence triggered by Brexit referendum, expectations that the U.S. Federal Reserve would slow the pace of rate hikes and major central banks’ monetary easing improved investor sentiment. The Hang Seng Index reached a high of 24,100 in September. However, as a result of the U.S. presidential election and expectations of faster rate hikes, the market weakened again in the last quarter. Overall, the Hang Seng Index slightly increased by 0.4% in 2016, contrasting with a decline of 7.2% in 2015. Daily average turnover dropped from HK$105.6 billion in the previous year to HK$66.9 billion, and total capital raised in the local stock market decreased from HK$1,115.6 billion to HK$490.1 billion.

src_raw: 住宅物業市場在2016年略為波動。物業成交量於第1季錄得歷史新低後，在其後數月有所回升，但在11月推出新印花稅措施後再度下挫。整體而言，成交量在2016年稍跌至54,701宗。另一方面，樓價自第2季起上升並超越2015年9月的高位，2016年的累計升幅為7.8%（圖6）。置業負擔能力依然偏緊，樓價與收入比率為15.9，超越1997年的歷史高位；而收入槓桿比率為72.0%，遠高於長期平均水平。2 由於銀行推出具競爭力的按揭計劃，按揭利率稍為回落，於接近年底時則跟隨香港銀行同業拆息上升而略為回升。工商物業市場方面，全年交投大致保持穩定。由於非住宅物業價格較2015年高位回落，相應租金收益率較上年微升，但仍處於低位。
mt_raw: The residential property market experienced some fluctuations in 2016. After hitting the lowest level on record in the first quarter, transaction volume recovered over the subsequent months but declined again after the new stamp duty measures were introduced in November. Overall, transactions for the year slightly fell to 54,701. Meanwhile, property prices rose from the second quarter onward, surpassing the September 2015 high, with cumulative growth of 7.8% in 2016 (Figure 6). Housing affordability remained tight, with the price-to-income ratio at 15.9, exceeding the 1997 peak; the income leverage ratio stood at 72.0%, well above the long-term average. Thanks to competitive mortgage plans introduced by banks, mortgage interest rates slightly declined but edged up again toward year-end as Hong Kong interbank offered rates increased. The commercial property sector saw stable trading volume over the year. Prices declined from their 2015 peaks, and the corresponding rental yields rose slightly year-on-year but remained low.

src_raw: 預期2017年實質本地生產總值增長將保持溫和。政府預測經濟增長幅度介乎2至3%之間，私營機構分析員預測增幅平均為2.0%。外圍方面，隨着環球宏觀經濟及金融環境變得不明朗，全球經濟及貿易增長或會保持溫和；再加上港元實質有效匯率因美元強勢而上升，將會抑制香港的出口表現。本地方面，雖然穩定的就業及收入狀況會支持消費，但受利率上升所拖累，預期私人消費會溫和增長。受惠於住屋供應增加及多個基建項目展開，樓宇及建造活動應會穩步增長，但營商氣氛疲弱及利率趨升將影響商界資本投資。
mt_raw: Real GDP growth is projected to stay moderate in 2017. The government forecasts growth of 2-3%, with private sector analysts expecting an average of 2.0%. External outlook remains uncertain amid global macroeconomic and financial environment ambiguities, likely resulting in continued moderate growth of the world economy and trade. The appreciation of the effective real exchange rate of the HKD against the backdrop of a strong USD will weigh on Hong Kong’s export performance. Domestically, stable employment and income conditions will support consumption, but rising interest rates are expected to lead to modest growth in private consumption. Increased housing supply and ongoing infrastructure projects should support steady growth in building and construction activities, but weak business sentiment and rising interest rates could dampen corporate capital investment.

src_raw: 預計2017年通脹壓力仍然溫和。一方面環球商品價格上漲及中國內地通脹趨升或會令進口價格上升，另一方面港元轉強卻可能會令上述壓力受到遏抑。在溫和的經濟動力下，本地成本壓力仍可受控，但由於新訂住宅租金於2017年初上升，綜合消費物價指數中的租金組成項目通脹可能會稍升。市場共識預測2017年整體通脹率為1.9%，政府預期基本通脹率為2.0%。雖然不明朗因素加劇或會影響招聘意欲，私營機構分析員預計2017年失業率會維持於3.4%。
mt_raw: Inflationary pressures are expected to remain modest in 2017. Global commodity prices and rising inflation in Mainland China may lift import prices, but a strengthening HKD could offset these pressures. Under moderate economic momentum, local costs will stay contained, but rents for new private residential units are expected to rise early in 2017, possibly pushing up rent components within the CPI slightly. Market consensus points to an overall inflation rate of 1.9% for 2017, with the government projecting a basic inflation rate of 2.0%. Increased uncertainty in the market may impact hiring intentions, but private sector analysts forecast unemployment to remain at 3.4%.

mt_raw: The 2017 economic outlook faces many uncertainties, especially external ones. U.S. policy uncertainty under the new administration could bring increased unpredictability to the global outlook, with protectionist measures possibly hampering trade. Brexit and upcoming elections in major European countries may cause asset market fluctuations and influence capital flows into the HKD. Additionally, normalization of U.S. interest rates will tighten financial conditions locally and exert downward pressures on the economy and asset prices, particularly in the housing market, where demand remains tight amid ongoing uncertainties. In the short term, low mortgage rates, stable employment and income, and incentives from developers (such as discounts and cash rebates) may support housing demand. Conversely, new stamp duty measures, potential faster U.S. rate hikes, and steady housing supply growth could continue to pose headwinds for the property market.

src_raw: 零售銀行在2016年的盈利略為改善，其香港業務的整體除稅前經營溢利增長8.7%。增長主要是由外匯及衍生工具業務收入（+39.7%）、附屬公司派發的股息收入（+123.5%）及淨利息收入（+2.8%）所帶動，不過部份增長被費用及佣金收入減少(-11.3%)所抵銷。零售銀行除稅後溢利錄得44.4%的升幅，增長主要來自非經常項目。零售銀行除稅後平均資產回報率亦相應由2015 年的 1.04% 上升至 1.44%（圖 8）。
mt_raw: Retail banking profits improved slightly in 2016, with pre-tax operating profit increasing by 8.7% overall. Growth was driven mainly by income from foreign exchange and derivatives (+39.7%), dividends received from subsidiaries (+123.5%), and net interest income (+2.8%), though some gains were offset by a decrease in expenses and commissions (-11.3%). After tax, retail banking profit surged by 44.4%, mainly due to non-recurring items. The average return on assets of retail banks increased from 1.04% in 2015 to 1.44% (Figure 8).

src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s main monetary policy goal is to maintain monetary stability, specifically to keep the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate stable within the interval of 7.75 to 7.85 HKD per USD on the foreign exchange market. The monetary system primarily adopts the Currency Board Arrangements, which stipulate that the US dollar reserves held by the Exchange Fund provide at least 100% backing to the monetary base. Any change in the monetary base must be matched dollar-for-dollar with corresponding increases or decreases in US dollar reserves, ensuring full support of the monetary base by foreign exchange reserves.

- Foreign exchange fund notes and bonds issued by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority on behalf of the government.

terms: {'兌換保證': 'Convertibility undertaking', '兌換範圍': 'Convertibility Zone', '弱方兌換保證匯率': 'weak-side CU', '強方兌換保證匯率': 'strong-side CU', '總結餘': 'Aggregate Balance', '自動利率調節機制': 'interest rate adjustment mechanism', '金管局': 'HKMA'}
src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。若市場對港元的需求大過供應，令市場匯率轉強至7.75港元兌1美元的強方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行沽出港元、買入美元，使總結餘增加及港元利率下跌，從而令港元匯率從強方兌換保證匯率水平回復至7.75到7.85的兌換範圍內。相反，若港元供過於求，令市場匯率轉弱至7.85港元兌1美元的弱方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行買入港元，使總結餘減少及推高港元利率，港元匯率隨之由弱方兌換保證匯率水平回復至兌換範圍內。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority maintains exchange rate stability through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and a firm commitment to currency convertibility guarantees. If market demand for HKD exceeds supply, causing the exchange rate to strengthen to the strong-side convertibility rate of 7.75 HKD per USD, the HKMA will sell HKD and buy USD from banks, increasing the aggregate balance and lowering HKD interest rates. This action helps the exchange rate revert from the strong-side convertibility rate back within the 7.75–7.85 exchange rate range. Conversely, if HKD supply exceeds demand, causing the exchange rate to weaken towards the weak-side convertibility rate of 7.85 HKD per USD, the HKMA will buy HKD from banks, reducing the aggregate balance and raising HKD interest rates, thus restoring the exchange rate within the target range.

src_raw: 港元匯率在2016年首兩個月略有波動後，於年內餘下時間一直窄幅徘徊。港元在2016年初兌美元顯著轉弱，由1月4日的7.7510降至1月20日的7.8196（圖1）。港元匯率轉弱符合聯繫匯率制度的正常運作，反映美國在2015年12月加息後港元與美元的負息差擴濶。此外，其他市場相關因素，包括香港股市出現拋售、內地及香港經濟前景不及以前樂觀、人民幣匯率波動增加，以及亞洲貨幣普遍疲弱，均導致港元需求減弱。受到市場氣氛改善支持，港元匯率在2月略為轉強，並自3月起一直在7.753至7.776之間窄幅徘徊，即使英國脫歐公投及美國總統選舉引發市場波動亦未受影響。由於市場預期美國會在夏季加息，港元匯率於5月出現短暫的轉弱壓力。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2016年一直正常運作。
mt_raw: After slight fluctuations in the first two months of 2016, the HKD exchange rate largely remained within a narrow range throughout the rest of the year. In early 2016, the HKD depreciated significantly, dropping from 7.7510 on January 4 to 7.8196 on January 20 (Chart 1). The weakening of the HKD aligned with the normal operation of the Linked Exchange Rate System, reflecting a widening of the negative interest differential between HKD and USD following US rate hikes in December 2015. Additionally, other market factors, including stock sell-offs in Hong Kong, less optimistic outlooks for the Mainland and Hong Kong economies, increased RMB exchange rate volatility, and widespread weakness of Asian currencies, contributed to reduced demand for HKD. Supported by improved market sentiment, the HKD appreciated slightly in February and traded within 7.753 to 7.776 from March onwards, remaining unaffected by Brexit or US presidential election market volatility. Expectations of US interest rate hikes during summer prompted brief depreciation pressures in May. Overall, the HKD foreign exchange market operated normally throughout 2016.

src_raw: 由於兌換保證沒有被觸發，因此總結餘及未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額在2016年沒有明顯變動，大致維持在12,222億港元左右（圖2）。年內金管局增發總值1,320億港元的外匯基金票據，以滿足銀行在流動性管理方面的龐大需求，令總結餘相應減少至2016年底的2,596億港元。增發外匯基金票據符合貨幣發行局制度的原則，這是由於增發外匯基金票據只屬貨幣基礎組成部分之間的轉移，即由總結餘移至未償還外匯基金票據及債券，貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: Since the convertibility guarantee was not triggered, the total balance and the total amount of outstanding foreign exchange fund notes and bonds remained relatively unchanged in 2016, roughly maintaining around HK$1,222.2 billion (Chart 2). During the year, the HKMA issued an additional HK$132 billion of foreign exchange fund notes to meet banks’ substantial liquidity management needs, resulting in a decrease in the total balance to HK$259.6 billion by year-end. The issuance of foreign exchange fund notes aligns with the principles of the Currency Board Arrangements, representing transfers within the components of the monetary base—that is, from the total balance to the outstanding foreign exchange fund notes and bonds—while the overall backing remains fully supported by foreign exchange reserves.

src_raw: 香港銀行同業拆息在2016年大部分時間維持在較低水平（圖3）。香港銀行同業拆息在1、2月期間因金融市場波動加劇而面對一些上升壓力，但在3月隨着金融環境回復平靜而轉趨穩定。於第2及第3季，儘管市場關注英國脫歐公投結果以及美國貨幣市場基金改革，香港銀行同業拆息仍大致保持穩定。部分受到年底資金需求影響，以及港元拆息追回美元拆息的升幅，香港銀行同業拆息在第4季錄得較大升幅。儘管如此，短期銀行同業拆息在2016年大致維持在低於基本利率的水平。
mt_raw: Interbank offered rates (HIBORs) in Hong Kong mostly stayed at low levels throughout 2016 (Chart 3). During January and February, Hong Kong interbank rates faced upward pressures amid financial market volatility but stabilized from March as market conditions calmed. In the second and third quarters, despite concerns over Brexit and the US money market fund reforms, the rates remained broadly stable. In the fourth quarter, due to year-end liquidity demands and the narrowing HKD–USD interest rate differential, HKHIBOR experienced a significant rise. Nevertheless, short-term interbank rates stayed generally below the basic interest rate level throughout 2016.

src_raw: 因應美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍於12月14日（美國時間）由0.25至0.50厘上調至0.50至0.75厘，基本利率於12月15日由0.75厘上調至1.00厘。基本利率的調整是按照於2009年3月26日宣布的經修訂計算公式作出。按照該公式，基本利率定於美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍下限加50基點的水平，或隔夜與1個月香港銀行同業拆息的5天移動平均數的平均值水平，兩者以較高者為準。
mt_raw: Following the December 14 (US time) increase in the US Federal Funds target rate from 0.25–0.50% to 0.50–0.75%, the HKMA adjusted the base rate from 0.75% to 1.00% on December 15. This adjustment follows the revised calculation formula announced on March 26, 2009, where the base rate is set at the higher of either the US Federal Funds rate target lower bound plus 50 basis points or the 5-day moving average of overnight and 1-month HKD interbank rates.

src_raw: 港元遠期匯率點子在1月出現大幅溢價，大致跟隨港元與美元息差的走勢，以及部分反映投資者為其港股組合作出外匯對沖的需求（圖4）。遠期匯率溢價在2月開始收窄。隨着市況轉趨穩定，港元遠期匯率點子在3至11月期間大致保持穩定，其後在12月因港元與美元息差收窄而再度上升。整體而言，香港貨幣市場運作暢順，銀行同業流動資金充裕。貼現窗借貸在2016年並不活躍，僅涉及53億港元。
mt_raw: The HKD forward points surged in January, primarily tracking the interest rate differentials between HKD and USD, and partially reflecting investor hedging needs for their Hong Kong stock portfolios (Chart 4). Forward points Premium narrowed from February. As market conditions stabilized from March to November, the forward points mostly remained stable, then rose again in December due to the narrowing interest rate differential. Overall, the Hong Kong monetary market operated smoothly with ample bank liquidity. Discount window lending was not active in 2016, involving only HK$5.3 billion.

src_raw: 儘管經歷多次區內以至全球金融危機，聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）過去數十年來一直是香港貨幣及金融穩定的基石。2016年初市場波動加劇，再度引起有關港元轉弱及情況有如亞洲金融危機時期的評論。為增進各界對聯匯制度的認識，金管局向公眾闡釋聯匯制度的技術細節，並指出香港金融體系有能力抵禦衝擊。政府亦重申堅決維持聯匯制度。外匯及貨幣市場穩定，進一步鞏固公眾對政府維持聯匯制度的決心以及港元作為支付及保值貨幣的信心。國際貨幣基金組織在與香港進行年度第四條磋商時，明確表示聯匯制度是最適合香港的貨幣制度，指出香港靈活的經濟結構、充裕的財政及儲備緩衝、以及穩健有效的金融監管是聯匯制度的後盾。
mt_raw: Despite multiple regional and global financial crises, the Linked Exchange Rate System has been a cornerstone of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability for decades. Early in 2016, market volatility increased again, leading to comments about a weakening HKD and the situation resembling the Asian Financial Crisis. In response, the HKMA clarified the technical workings of the system and reiterated Hong Kong’s capacity to withstand shocks. The government reaffirmed its firm commitment to maintaining the Linked Exchange Rate System. Stable foreign exchange and money markets further solidified public confidence in the government’s resolve to uphold the system and in the HKD’s role as a medium of exchange and store of value. During the annual fourth review of the IMF, the IMF explicitly stated that the system was the most suitable monetary arrangement for Hong Kong, citing Hong Kong’s flexible economic structure, ample fiscal and reserve buffers, and robust, effective financial regulation as its backing.

src_raw: 鑑於穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用，金管局繼續密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理以及壓力測試結果，並加強對銀行個人、企業及內地相關貸款的監管，以確保銀行體系具備應付衝擊的能力。面對美國貨幣政策正常化，香港銀行同業拆息開始上升，金管局提醒市民保持警覺，並作好準備以應付可能出現的市場波動及風險。
mt_raw: Given the critical role of a sound banking system for the normal operation of the Linked Exchange Rate System, the HKMA continues to closely monitor banks’ credit, liquidity, and interest rate risk management, as well as stress test results. It also enhances supervision of individual, corporate, and Mainland-related loans to ensure the banking sector's resilience. As US monetary policy normalizes, with HKHIBOR rising, the HKMA reminds the public to stay vigilant and be prepared for possible market volatility and risks.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2016年在106.3至107.5%之間的窄幅上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於2016年12月31日為106.7%（圖5）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，能在面對突如其來的衝擊時為香港貨幣及金融穩定提供強力後盾。
mt_raw: To enhance transparency of the Currency Board Account, since October 1998, part of the foreign exchange reserves has been designated to support the monetary base. The support ratio (assets supporting the monetary base against the monetary base) fluctuated narrowly in 2016 between 106.3% and 107.5%, without breaching upper or lower limits. The ratio stood at 106.7% as of December 31, 2016 (Chart 5). Although certain foreign exchange reserves are designated as supporting assets under the system, the entire foreign exchange reserve can be used to support the HKD exchange rate. The large fiscal buffer of the reserves provides strong backing for Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability in face of unexpected shocks.

src_raw:
年內研究中心舉辦6項國際會議及研討會，主要包括：
- 於1月舉辦「第7屆中國經濟年度國際研討會」，主題為「中國對全球經濟的影響日益加深」，其間發表8份涵蓋廣泛議題的研究論文，包括中國增長再平衡及增長潛力、來自中國的經濟外溢效應、人民幣對全球及區內的影響，以及人民幣市場之間的利差交易走勢及資訊流動。
- 於3月與香港科技大學及慶應大學合辦「科技大學與慶應大學及研究中心匯率及宏觀經濟研討會」，內容涵蓋多個不同經濟議題，包括全球經濟失衡、匯率動態變化、資本管制及貨幣政策。
- 於8月與香港城市大學合辦「房地產與金融穩定研討會」，會上發表的論文內容涵蓋年齡、人口與住屋需求；大額投資者對資產質素的影響；香港房屋價格動態變動；住屋市場負擔能力；按揭規例對家庭生命周期置業決定的影響，以及中國內地的住宅物業市場。
- 於10月與金管局及國際結算銀行合辦有關亞太區經濟體系的研討會，主題為「在動盪不穩的全球環境下區內經濟體系的抗震能力」。研討會吸引多間央行的高層、主要學者及來自國際組織與私人機構的專家出席，就亞太區經濟體系最迫切的事項進行互動式圓桌討論，交流意見。探討的議題涵蓋廣泛，包括亞洲的金融失衡狀況、資金流、內地經濟放緩對區內其他地方的外溢效應，以及亞洲潛在增長受到的影響及前景。
mt_raw:
The institute organized six international seminars and conferences in 2016, including:
- The 7th Annual International Conference on the Chinese Economy in January, themed “The Deepening Impact of China on the Global Economy,” featuring eight papers on topics such as China’s growth rebalancing and potential, economic spillovers from China, RMB’s impact on global and regional economies, and inter-market yield spreads and information flows.
- The joint “Exchange Rate and Macroeconomics Conference” with HKUST and Keio University in March, addressing issues such as global economic imbalances, exchange rate dynamics, capital controls, and monetary policy.
- The “Real Estate and Financial Stability Conference” with City University in August, focusing on age, demographics, housing demand, the impact of large investors on asset quality, dynamics of housing prices in Hong Kong, affordability, the effects of mortgage regulations on household decision-making, and China's Mainland property market.
- The joint “Asia-Pacific Economies Resilience in a Volatile Global Environment” seminar with HKMA and BIS in October, attracting senior central bank officials, leading academics, and experts from international and private institutions for interactive roundtable discussions on urgent issues in the Asia-Pacific region, such as financial imbalances, capital flows, spillovers from China’s slowdown, and potential growth prospects.
- The 14th Annual Summer Workshop in August and the 14th Mainland China Economic Seminar in September, examining asset quality and financial stability in Mainland banks. These events drew academics, financial sector participants, and central bank representatives worldwide. The institute also held 21 public outreach seminars exploring broad economic, monetary, and financial issues during the year.

src_raw: 截至2016年底，流通銀行紙幣（指發鈔銀行發行的紙幣）總值4,078億港元，較上年增加13.2%（圖6、7及8）。政府發行的流通紙幣及硬幣總值118億港元，較上年增加5.3%（圖9及10）。在政府發行的紙幣及硬幣中，10港元流通紙幣總值44億港元，當中塑質鈔票佔86%。
mt_raw: By the end of 2016, the total value of circulation banknotes (issued by note-issuing banks) was HK$407.8 billion, representing a 13.2% increase from the previous year (Charts 6-8). The total value of government-issued circulating banknotes and coins was HK$11.8 billion, a 5.3% rise from 2015 (Charts 9-10). Among the government-issued banknotes and coins, the HK$10 circulating banknotes totaled HK$4.4 billion, of which 86% were polymer notes.

terms: {'中小企': 'SMes', '以客為本的企業文化': 'customer-centric culture', '信用與流動性風險管理系統': 'credit and liquidity risk management systems', '初創企業': 'start-up companies', '對客戶的保障': 'customer protection', '投資及保險產品': 'investment and insurance products', '普及金融': 'financial inclusion', '網絡攻擊': 'cyber attacks', '金管局': 'HKMA', '金融罪行': 'financial crime', '銀行體系': 'banking system', '風險管治架構': 'risk governance framework', '香港': 'Hong Kong'}
src_raw: 儘管環球市場風險及震盪增加，香港銀行體系在2016年仍維持穩健。金管局在年內加強監管認可機構的風險管治架構，以及信用與流動性風險管理系統的成效。鑑於網絡攻擊日趨頻繁，金管局亦加強監管認可機構的科技風險管理。為貫徹金管局致力打擊金融罪行的目標，認可機構打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集監控措施的成效，繼續是金管局的監管重點。在監管認可機構的操守方面，金管局採取實質行動，推動以客為本的企業文化及促進普及金融，和應對海外中小企及初創企業在香港開立及維持銀行帳戶方面遇到的困難。金管局亦加強監管認可機構銷售投資及保險產品的手法，以進一步提升對客戶的保障。
mt_raw: Despite increased global market risks and turbulence, the Hong Kong banking system remained resilient in 2016. The HKMA strengthened the risk governance framework of its approved institutions and the effectiveness of their credit and liquidity risk management systems throughout the year. Given the increasing frequency of cyber attacks, the HKMA also enhanced cybersecurity risk management for approved institutions. To fulfill its goal of combating financial crimes, the HKMA continued to focus on monitoring measures to combat money laundering and terrorist financing, which remain key supervisory priorities. In terms of conduct, the HKMA took substantive actions to promote customer-centric culture and financial literacy, and addressed difficulties faced by overseas SMEs and start-ups in opening and maintaining bank accounts in Hong Kong. The HKMA also intensified supervision of approved institutions’ sales practices for investment and insurance products to further enhance customer protection.

src_raw: 在監管政策方面，金管局就香港實施國際監管及會計標準的準備工作取得重大進展；當中包括穩定資金淨額比率、大額風險承擔限額、國際財務報告準則第9號及《金融機構（處置機制）條例》下的處置框架。
mt_raw: On the policy front, the HKMA made significant progress in implementing international regulatory and accounting standards in Hong Kong; including the implementation of the Basel III liquidity standards, large exposure limits, International Financial Reporting Standard 9, and the resolution framework under the Banking (Resolution) Ordinance.

terms: {'企業管治': 'corporate governance', '外聘審計師': 'external auditors', '獨立非執行董事': 'independent non-executive directors', '薪酬制度': 'remuneration systems', '金管局': 'HKMA', '非現場審查': 'off-site reviews'}
src_raw: 金管局在2016年共進行188次非現場審查，涵蓋範圍廣泛，包括認可機構的CAMEL評級、企業管治、業務運作及風險管理。金管局加強與認可機構董事局的聯繫，以強化銀行業的風險管治及企業文化。除與董事局或董事局委員會舉行會議外，亦另行與獨立非執行董事（獨立非執董）會面，就企業文化及風險管治事宜交換意見。金管局亦與認可機構及其外聘審計師舉行三方聯席會議。此外，金管局就認可機構的薪酬制度是否有助促進有效的風險管理進行評估。
mt_raw: In 2016, the HKMA conducted 188 off-site reviews covering a broad scope, including the CAMEL ratings, corporate governance, operational practices, and risk management of approved institutions. The HKMA strengthened its communication with the boards of directors of approved institutions to reinforce bank risk governance and corporate culture. Besides meetings with boards or their committees, it also held separate discussions with independent non-executive directors (INEDs) to exchange views on corporate culture and risk governance. The HKMA also held tripartite meetings with approved institutions and their external auditors. Moreover, it evaluated whether the approved institutions’ remuneration policies supported effective risk management.

terms: {'償付能力壓力測試': 'solvency stress testing programme', '壓力測試': 'stress-test', '恢復計劃': 'recovery plans', '資本充足水平': 'capital adequacy', '資本目標': 'capital targets', '金管局': 'HKMA'}
src_raw: 在資本充足水平方面，金管局審視認可機構的資本計劃，包括其未來數年的資本目標，以便就2019年全面實施《巴塞爾協定三》緩衝資本作好準備。認可機構的償付能力壓力測試亦因應當前宏觀經濟環境作出改進。金管局又審慎評估各主要零售銀行的恢復計劃，並就需要改善的環節提出意見。
mt_raw: Regarding capital adequacy, the HKMA reviewed the capital plans of approved institutions, including their capital targets for future years, to prepare for the full implementation of Basel III buffers by 2019. Recovery stress testing was also improved to reflect current macroeconomic conditions. The HKMA carefully assessed the recovery plans of major retail banks and provided recommendations for improvements.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局繼續以專題評估配合定期現場審查，而專題評估主要適用於被評定為較高風險的範疇。這種監管方法讓金管局更有效地調配監管資源，以應對認可機構所面對的各項新增及主要風險。金管局在2016年共進行377次現場審查及專題評估。這些審查與評估的重點仍是信用風險管理與監控，尤其涉及內地相關業務的信用風險；另一個重點是打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集監控措施。金管局又增加對流動性風險、業務操作風險及科技風險管理的現場審查及專題評估次數。年內專項審查小組亦對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查。
mt_raw: Beyond off-site reviews, the HKMA continued thematic assessments combined with periodic on-site examinations, mainly targeting higher-risk areas. This approach enabled a more effective allocation of supervisory resources to address newly identified and significant risks faced by approved institutions. In 2016, a total of 377 on-site examinations and thematic assessments were carried out. The focus remained on credit risk management and monitoring, especially related to Mainland China-related business; another key area was the monitoring of anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing measures. The HKMA also increased on-site assessments for liquidity, operational risks, and cyber risks. During the year, a special review team conducted on-site examinations of approved institutions’ securities, investment products, insurance, and MPF-related businesses.

src_raw: 銀行貸款在2016年增長溫和。未償還貸款總額全年增加6.5%；2015年的增幅則為3.5%（表2）。由於客戶存款的增幅超過銀行貸款的增幅，整體貸存比率由2015年底的70.1%降至2016年底的68.4%。
mt_raw: Bank loans grew modestly in 2016, with total outstanding loans increasing by 6.5% over the year; in 2015, the growth was 3.5% (see Table 2). Since customer deposits increased at a faster rate than loans, the overall loans-to-deposits ratio declined from 70.1% at end-2015 to 68.4% at end-2016.

src_raw: 銀行業的資產質素在2016年維持穩健。儘管零售銀行的特定分類貸款比率由2015年底的0.69%微升至2016年底的0.72%，但仍遠低於2000年以來的長期平均水平2.4%。同期，整體銀行業的特定分類貸款比率由0.73%上升至0.85%。年內銀行業的內地相關貸款的資產質素呈相若走勢；同期，零售銀行這些貸款的特定分類貸款比率由0.78%微升至0.82%，整體銀行業的相關比率亦由一年前的0.77%微升至0.80%。
mt_raw: Asset quality in the banking sector remained sound in 2016. Although the specific classified loan ratio for retail banks rose slightly from 0.69% at the end of 2015 to 0.72% at the end of 2016, it still remained well below the long-term average of 2.4% since 2000. The overall classified loan ratio for the entire banking sector increased from 0.73% to 0.85% during the same period. The asset quality of Mainland China-related loans in 2016 was generally stable; for retail banks, the specific classified loan ratio increased slightly from 0.78% to 0.82%, and for the entire banking sector, the related ratio rose marginally from 0.77% to 0.80%.

src_raw: 金管局投入大量監管資源，以確保認可機構繼續採用審慎的信貸審批標準，並維持有效的貸款分類及撥備制度。金管局在監管過程中亦特別關注認可機構對中國內地民營企業的風險承擔持續增加，以及為增加收益而投資於債務證券所引起的信用風險。此外，金管局就認可機構分銷高風險投資產品的信用風險管理進行專題評估。
mt_raw: The HKMA allocated substantial supervisory resources to ensure that approved institutions continued to adopt prudent credit approval standards and maintained effective loan classification and provisioning systems. It paid particular attention to the rising risk exposures of approved institutions to Mainland Chinese private enterprises, and the credit risks arising from their investments in debt securities aimed at increasing yields. Additionally, the HKMA conducted thematic assessments of credit risk management in approved institutions’ distribution of high-risk investment products.

src_raw: 金管局繼續密切留意認可機構的物業貸款業務。住宅物業價格於2015年9月開始出現調整，但其後於2016年3月再度上升，全年上升8%。新造住宅物業按揭貸款的平均按揭成數，由2009年9月金管局尚未推出首輪物業貸款逆周期措施時的64%，降至2016年12月的51%。新造住宅物業按揭貸款的平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年8月首度推出供款與入息比率上限時的41%，降至2016年12月的34%（圖1）。
mt_raw: The HKMA continued closely monitoring mortgage lending activities. Residential property prices, which had begun to decline in September 2015, increased again in March 2016, ending the year up 8%. The average loan-to-value (LTV) ratio for new residential mortgage loans decreased from 64% before the HKMA launched its first round of macroprudential measures in September 2009 to 51% in December 2016. Similarly, the average debt-service ratio for new residential mortgages fell from 41% in August 2010, when limits on debt-service ratios were first introduced, to 34% in December 2016 (see Figure 1).

src_raw: 年內有更多地產發展商向物業買家直接提供按揭貸款，其按揭成數往往高於金管局對認可機構實施審慎要求下許可的水平。金管局密切留意有關發展，並定期與認可機構溝通，以評估銀行有否繼續有效管理對地產發展商的風險承擔。此外，土地註冊處應金管局要求，同意向認可機構提供電子提示服務。使用這項服務的認可機構，當有其他按揭文書就其承按的物業交付土地註冊處辦理註冊時，會收到該處發出的電子提示訊息。這項服務將有助應對按揭借款人未有事先獲得承按認可機構同意下，擅自以同一物業借取額外按揭貸款的情況。土地註冊處已於2017年第1季推出電子提示服務。
mt_raw: During the year, more property developers offered mortgages directly to homebuyers, often with higher LTV ratios than permitted under prudent requirements imposed by the HKMA on approved institutions. The HKMA closely monitored these developments and regularly communicated with approved institutions to assess whether banks continued to effectively manage the associated risks. Additionally, the Lands Department, at the HKMA’s request, agreed to provide electronic notification services to approved institutions. When mortgaged properties receive registration entries from the Land Registry, approved institutions using this service will receive electronic alerts. This service helps address cases where mortgage borrowers take additional loans against the same property without prior approval from their approved institution. The Land Registry launched this electronic notification service in the first quarter of 2017.

terms: {'國際金融中心': 'international financial centre', '金管局': 'HKMA', '香港': 'Hong Kong'}
src_raw: 與其他國際金融中心一樣，香港面對的網絡威脅與日俱增。金管局於2016年接到認可機構通報發現未經授權股票交易及試圖入侵其支付系統的個案，並隨即採取行動應對這些攻擊造成的風險。金管局發出電子銀行服務提示，提醒公眾慎防網上股票交易騙案，並建議公眾採取預防措施。金管局又向認可機構發出通告，就進一步加強網上銀行服務監控可採取的保安措施提供指引。有關試圖入侵銀行支付系統的個案，金管局在香港首次發現相關個案時已提醒認可機構留意這類騙案，並在警方協助下說明這類騙案的犯案手法，以及要求認可機構在加強支付操作的監控措施時須顧及有關手法。
mt_raw: Similar to other global financial centers, Hong Kong faces increasing cyber threats. In 2016, the HKMA received reports from approved institutions indicating unauthorized stock trading and attempted intrusions into their payment systems, prompting immediate action to mitigate these risks. The HKMA issued alerts on electronic banking services to remind the public to beware of online stock trading scams and advised on preventive measures. It also issued notices to approved institutions offering guidance on enhancing cybersecurity for online banking services. The HKMA had previously warned about such scams when they first emerged in Hong Kong, detailing the tactics used with police assistance, and emphasized the importance of strengthening payment operation surveillance.

src_raw: 為進一步提升銀行體系應對網絡風險的能力，金管局於2016年5月推出網絡防衛計劃。此計劃由三項支柱組成，即網絡防衛評估框架、專業培訓計劃及網絡風險資訊共享平台（詳見「香港的國際金融中心地位」一章「金融科技促進辦公室」部分）。金管局在12月向認可機構發出通告，列載網絡防衛評估框架的實施時間表。
mt_raw: To further enhance the banking system’s cyber resilience, the HKMA launched a Cybersecurity Fortification Initiative (CFI) in May 2016. The program comprises three pillars: a cybersecurity risk assessment framework, professional training, and a cybersecurity risk information sharing platform (see “Hong Kong’s Status as an International Financial Center” Chapter “Fintech Facilitation Office”). In December, the HKMA issued a notice outlining the implementation timetable for the cybersecurity risk assessment framework.

src_raw: 金融科技在銀行業的應用於2016年長足發展，多間認可機構推出新的金融科技產品，其中個人小額支付服務、非接觸式流動支付及生物認證這幾個範疇的發展尤為顯著。金管局在9月推出「金融科技監管沙盒」，讓認可機構能在受控環境中就其金融科技項目先作試行，而無需完全符合金管局的監管規定。有關安排讓認可機構在正式推出金融科技服務前，可及早收集真實數據及用戶意見，以便作出適當修改。截至2016年底，共有6項使用金融科技監管沙盒的申請獲批，有關的新金融科技產品涉及生物認證、證券交易及用於按揭估值的區塊鏈。金管局又在11月上調無需雙重認證的網上銀行個人小額支付服務的交易上限至每個帳戶每日5,000港元，以應付日益增加的簡便個人支付服務需求。
mt_raw: The application of financial technology (Fintech) in banking grew rapidly in 2016, with many approved institutions introducing new Fintech products, especially in personal small-value payments, contactless mobile payments, and biometric authentication. In September, the HKMA launched the Fintech Supervisory Sandbox, allowing approved institutions to pilot their Fintech projects in a controlled environment without fully complying with existing regulations. This facility enables early collection of real transaction data and user feedback, allowing for necessary adjustments later. By the end of 2016, six applications to use the Fintech Supervisory Sandbox had been approved, involving biometric authentication, securities trading, and blockchain-based mortgage valuation. In November, the HKMA raised the transaction limit for online banking small-value payments without dual authentication to HK$5,000 per day per account, to meet rising demand for convenient personal payment services.

src_raw: 2016年發生多宗與物業相關的騙案，當中涉及騙徒假扮業主，試圖藉申請按揭貸款或出售有關物業謀取利益。雖然這些騙案並不涉及認可機構，但金管局仍與警方及香港銀行公會（銀行公會）緊密合作，就偵測及防止這些騙案在銀行業內發生向認可機構提供指引。年內金管局出版兩期《操作事故通訊》，與業界分享從認可機構發生過的操作事故中汲取的教訓。金管局亦對認可機構的業務操作風險管理制度、詐騙管理方法、信託╱託管業務操作及防範違規或未經授權交易活動的風險管理及監控措施進行現場審查及專題評估。
mt_raw: In 2016, multiple property-related scams surfaced, involving fraudsters impersonating owners to apply for mortgages or sell properties for illicit gain. Although these scams do not directly involve approved institutions, the HKMA worked closely with police and the Hong Kong Association of Banks to provide guidance on detecting and preventing such frauds within banks. During the year, the HKMA published two issues of the Operational Incidents Watch to share lessons learned from past operational incidents. The HKMA also conducted on-site inspections and thematic assessments of approved institutions’ operational risk management systems, fraud prevention measures, trustee/custodian operations, and measures to mitigate risks of unauthorized or rogue transactions.

src_raw: 2016年發生數宗重大政治事件，引致金融市場在年內多次大幅波動。與此同時，美國利率繼續緩慢地正常化，聯邦公開市場委員會於12月決定調高聯邦基金利率，是全球金融危機以來的第二次。為應對這些政治事件作好準備，金管局與境外監管機構繼續保持緊密聯繫，並評估事件對香港銀行體系的影響，以及要求銀行保持警覺並加強其風險管理以應對不利的市場發展。
mt_raw: In 2016, several major political events led to significant volatility in financial markets. Meanwhile, U.S. interest rates continued to normalize gradually; in December, the Federal Open Market Committee raised the federal funds rate for the second time since the global financial crisis. To prepare for such political developments, the HKMA maintained close links with overseas regulators and assessed their potential impact on Hong Kong’s banking system, urging banks to remain vigilant and strengthen their risk management against adverse market conditions.

src_raw: 在流動性風險管理方面，金管局進行額外的流動性壓力測試，以評估銀行體系應對可能發生的嚴峻壓力情境的能力，並對認可機構作出跟進，以加強其應對能力。金管局在2015年針對利率風險管理進行一輪現場審查後，再進行額外的現場審查，以評估認可機構的市場風險管理，並要求在監控方面存有不足的認可機構作出糾正。
mt_raw: Regarding liquidity risk management, the HKMA conducted additional liquidity stress tests to evaluate the banking system’s resilience under severe stress scenarios, and followed up with approved institutions to enhance their preparedness. After a review of interest rate risk management through on-site examinations in 2015, further on-site reviews assessed market risk management, requiring institutions with weaknesses to address issues proactively.

src_raw: 金管局的風險為本打擊洗錢監管包括現場審查及非現場審查（包括就特定事件與認可機構進行的監管聯繫），主要針對洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險較高的範疇。審查內容涵蓋認可機構對洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險的評估、風險為本方法的落實情況，以及交易監察與制裁合規的制度和程序。金管局的專項監管人員在2016年共進行17次現場審查及30次非現場審查。
mt_raw: The HKMA’s risk-based AML/CFT supervision, comprising on-site and off-site reviews (including regulatory contact on specific incidents), primarily targeted areas with higher risks of money laundering and terrorist financing. Reviews covered the assessment of AML/CFT risks, implementation of a risk-based approach, transaction monitoring, and sanctions compliance procedures. In 2016, the HKMA conducted 17 on-site inspections and 30 off-site reviews.

src_raw: 香港維持其作為全球離岸人民幣業務樞紐的地位。去年的稅務修訂有助營造有利環境，吸引跨國公司在港設立企業財資中心。為發展香港成為基建融資中心與金融科技樞紐，金管局在年內成立基建融資促進辦公室及金融科技促進辦公室。年內金管局向儲值支付工具發行人批出13個牌照。香港穩健的財政表現及龐大的對外資產淨值，繼續獲得信貸評級機構確認，其中標準普爾維持對香港AAA的評級。
mt_raw: Hong Kong maintains its position as a global offshore renminbi business hub. Last year's tax amendments helped create a favorable environment to attract multinational companies to establish corporate treasury centres in Hong Kong. To develop Hong Kong into an infrastructure financing hub and a fintech centre, the HKMA established the Infrastructure Financing Office and the Fintech Facilitation Office during the year. Within the same period, the HKMA issued 13 licences to stored value facilities licensees. Hong Kong’s robust fiscal performance and large net external assets continue to be confirmed by credit rating agencies, with Standard & Poor’s maintaining a AAA rating for Hong Kong.

src_raw: 受到環球金融市場波動及人民幣匯率前景不確定性影響，2016年全球離岸人民幣業務有所放緩。儘管如此，香港維持其作為全球離岸人民幣業務樞紐的地位，處理全球約七成人民幣支付交易。深港股票市場交易互聯互通機制「深港通」於12月推出，標誌着內地資本帳開放的另一里程碑，並且是提升香港的國際金融中心地位的重要一步。金管局亦透過擴大對市場的人民幣流動性支援及推出措施增加人民幣市場流動性的透明度，強化金融基建。
mt_raw: Influenced by volatility in the global financial markets and uncertainties over the renminbi exchange rate outlook, global offshore renminbi activities slowed down in 2016. Nonetheless, Hong Kong retained its status as a global offshore renminbi business hub, processing about 70% of the world’s renminbi payments. The Shenzhen-Hong Kong Stock Connect was launched in December, marking another milestone in Mainland China’s capital account liberalization and an important step in enhancing Hong Kong’s status as an international financial centre. The HKMA further increased renminbi liquidity transparency through expanding liquidity support to the market and introducing measures to strengthen the liquidity and development of the renminbi market infrastructure.

src_raw: 金管局於7月成立基建融資促進辦公室(IFFO)，透過匯聚主要持份者促進基建發展，並發展香港成為基建融資中心。截至2017年1月底，已有超過60間機構加入IFFO成為合作夥伴。年內金管局亦成功推動法例修訂的通過，以消除稅務不對稱及提供稅務優惠，鼓勵跨國及內地公司在香港設立企業財資中心，為金融及專業服務行業帶來更多商機。在香港駐設業務的機構投資者數目亦逐漸增加，其中作為全球第三大主權基金的阿布扎比投資局於10月宣布在香港成立海外辦事處，是該機構唯一設於阿布扎比以外的辦事處。
mt_raw: In July, the HKMA established the Infrastructure Financing Office (IFFO) to gather major stakeholders to promote infrastructure development and develop Hong Kong into an infrastructure financing centre. As of the end of January 2017, over 60 institutions had joined IFFO as partners, including multilateral financial institutions, development banks, public sector investors, private sector investors, asset management companies, banks, insurance companies, infrastructure project developers and operators, professional service firms, and international trade associations (Table 1).

src_raw: 國際貨幣基金組織（基金組織）在去年的第四條磋商討論中對我們致力鞏固香港作為國際金融中心的地位給予正面評價。年內金管局積極參與國際討論，致力推進全球與區內金融穩定。金管局亦與國際信貸評級機構保持緊密溝通，有關工作有助香港的信貸評級在2016年獲得主要信貸評級機構確認。
mt_raw: Since its establishment, IFFO has made good progress. To enhance skills and knowledge, in October, IFFO and the International Finance Corporation (IFC) under the World Bank Group organised an executive workshop on “Private Sector Participation in Infrastructure Investment in Emerging Markets,” which received very positive feedback from participants and helped deepen their understanding and networks. In November, IFFO held a high-level seminar, inviting Mr. Jin Liqun, President of the Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank, to share experience in infrastructure project planning, operation, and management. In July, IFFO signed Memorandums of Understanding (MOUs) with IFC and the Global Infrastructure Facility to establish cooperation frameworks. In December, MOUs were also signed with the China Development Bank and the Export-Import Bank of China, promoting infrastructure project financing through the IFFO platform. These activities help strengthen Hong Kong’s position and reputation as an infrastructure financing hub.

mt_raw: The HKMA further strengthened Hong Kong’s retail payment infrastructure in 2016. Under the comprehensive Payment System and Stored Value Facilities (SVF) Ordinance enacted in November 2016, a total of 13 licences for stored value facilities were issued within the year. The scope of electronic check services has also been expanded to include cross-border payments between Hong Kong and Guangdong (including Shenzhen).

src_raw: 2016年環球金融市場波動及人民幣匯率前景不確定性令全球離岸人民幣業務有所放緩。截至年底，香港人民幣客戶存款及存款證餘額合共為6,251億元人民幣，較上年減少38%（圖1）。年內離岸人民幣債券發行量降至528億元人民幣，經香港銀行處理的人民幣貿易結算額亦降至45,421億元人民幣。另一方面，香港銀行截至年底的人民幣貸款餘額為2,948億元人民幣，與上年相若（圖2）。人民幣RTGS系統的交易額維持於高位，於2016年平均每日處理的交易額為8,636億元人民幣。由此可見，儘管人民幣資金池有所縮減，但仍繼續支持大量人民幣金融中介活動在香港進行。根據環球銀行金融電信協會(SWIFT)統計數字，2016年香港處理約七成人民幣支付交易，足以證明香港作為全球離岸人民幣業務樞紐的地位。
mt_raw: In 2016, global financial market volatility and uncertainties over the renminbi exchange rate outlook led to a slowdown in worldwide offshore renminbi activities. By year-end, Hong Kong’s renminbi customer deposits and certificates of deposit amounted to RMB 625.1 billion, a 38% decrease from the previous year (Figure 1). Offshore renminbi bond issuance declined to RMB 52.8 billion, and renminbi trade settlement processed through Hong Kong banks decreased to RMB 4,542.1 billion. Meanwhile, as of year-end, the renminbi loan balance in Hong Kong banks was RMB 294.8 billion, roughly unchanged from the previous year (Figure 2). Renminbi RTGS transaction volume remained high, averaging RMB 863.6 billion daily in 2016. Despite a reduction in the renminbi liquidity pool, the continued large-scale renminbi financial intermediation activities in Hong Kong demonstrate its essential role. According to SWIFT, in 2016, Hong Kong processed about 70% of the world’s renminbi payments, underscoring its status as a global offshore renminbi business hub.

src_raw: 年內金管局與內地有關當局緊密合作爭取更大政策空間，推展香港人民幣業務。年內推出多項新措施，包括進一步加大內地銀行間債券市場及外匯市場對外開放，以及在12月推出「深港通」。因應跨境投資渠道及市場對流動性管理需求增加，金管局擴大人民幣流動資金安排。於10月，金管局將一級流動性提供行的數目由7間增加至9間，有關計劃的總額度亦由140億元人民幣增加至180億元人民幣。金管局人民幣流動資金安排使用情況的透明度亦提高，有助參加行更有效管理流動資金。
mt_raw: Throughout the year, the HKMA worked closely with Mainland authorities to secure greater policy space and promote Hong Kong’s renminbi business. Several new measures were introduced, including further opening Mainland China’s interbank bond market and foreign exchange market, and the December launch of the “Shenzhen-Hong Kong Stock Connect.” In response to increased cross-border investment channels and market liquidity management needs, the HKMA expanded renminbi liquidity arrangements. In October, the number of primary liquidity providers was increased from 7 to 9, with total quotas rising from RMB 14 billion to RMB 18 billion. Transparency in the use of renminbi liquidity arrangements was also enhanced, helping participants manage liquidity more effectively.

src_raw: 金管局於7月成立IFFO，其使命是透過匯聚主要持份者共同促進基建投融資。截至2017年1月底，已有超過60間來自中國內地、香港及海外的機構加入IFFO成為合作夥伴，當中包括多邊金融機構及發展銀行、公營機構投資者、私營機構投資者、資產管理公司、銀行、保險公司、基建項目發展及營運機構、專業服務公司及國際貿易協會（表1）。
mt_raw: In July, the HKMA established IFFO, aiming to foster development through stakeholder collaboration. As of the end of January 2017, more than 60 institutions from Mainland China, Hong Kong, and overseas joined as partners, including multilateral financial institutions, development banks, public sector investors, private sector investors, asset management firms, banks, insurance companies, infrastructure project developers and operators, professional service providers, and international trade associations (Table 1).

src_raw: IFFO自成立以來取得良好進展。為致力提升技能，IFFO於10月聯同世界銀行集團旗下國際金融公司和瀚亞投資主辦行政人員工作坊，主題為「私營資金參與新興市場基建項目的投融資」。該工作坊獲得參與者非常正面的回應，有助增長知識及建立網絡。IFFO另於11月舉辦高層研討會，並邀請亞洲基礎設施投資銀行行長金立群先生主講及分享基建項目規劃、營運與管理的經驗。於7月，IFFO分別與國際金融公司及全球基礎設施中心簽訂《諒解備忘錄》，建立合作框架。另於12月分別與國家開發銀行及中國進出口銀行簽訂《諒解備忘錄》，透過IFFO平台促進該兩間銀行的基建項目融資。這些活動有助加強香港作為基建融資中心的地位及國際形象。
mt_raw: Since its inception, IFFO has made significant progress. To further enhance skills, IFFO organized an executive workshop in October, jointly with IFC and Eastspring Investments, on “Private Sector Participation in Infrastructure Investment in Emerging Markets,” which received very positive feedback and strengthened knowledge and networks. In November, IFFO hosted a high-level seminar with Mr. Jin Liqun, President of AIIB, sharing experiences in project planning, operation, and management. In July, IFFO signed MOUs with IFC and the Global Infrastructure Facility to establish cooperation frameworks. In December, MOUs were also signed with the China Development Bank and the Export-Import Bank of China to promote infrastructure project financing via the platform. These initiatives enhance Hong Kong's role and reputation as an infrastructure financing hub.

src_raw: 為進一步吸引跨國公司在香港設立企業財資中心，金管局與政府當局合作，營造一個對企業財資中心有利的稅務環境。具體上，《2016年稅務（修訂）（第2號）條例》（《修訂條例》）於6月通過，容許企業在符合指明條件下，在計算利得稅時可獲扣減經營集團內部融資業務的利息支出，以及就合資格企業財資中心指明財資業務的利潤，寬減利得稅百分之五十（即降至8.25%）。表2簡載《修訂條例》部分要點：
mt_raw: To further attract multinational companies to establish corporate treasury centres in Hong Kong, the HKMA and government authorities have collaborated to create a tax environment conducive to such centres. Specifically, the 《Taxation (Amendment) (No. 2) Ordinance 2016》 was enacted in June, allowing enterprises meeting specified criteria to deduct interest expenses on intra-group financing when calculating profits tax, and to enjoy a 50% reduction on profits derived from qualifying treasury activities, lowering the profits tax rate to 8.25%. Table 2 briefly outlines key points of the 《Amendment》.

src_raw: 除立法工作外，金管局亦積極向跨國和內地企業推廣在香港設立企業財資中心的優勢。截至年底，金管局已接觸近400間公司、金融機構及行業組織。金管局亦於11月與香港中國企業協會簽署《諒解備忘錄》，協助香港的中資企業進一步了解及更多利用我們的企業財資中心平台。
mt_raw: In addition to legislative work, the HKMA actively promotes the advantages of establishing corporate treasury centres in Hong Kong to multinational and Mainland Chinese enterprises. By year-end, the HKMA had engaged nearly 400 companies, financial institutions, and industry groups. In November, the HKMA signed an MOU with the Hong Kong Chinese Enterprises Association to assist Chinese firms in Hong Kong in better understanding and utilizing the platform for their treasury activities.

src_raw: 金管局繼續致力推廣香港作為資產管理中心。根據證券及期貨事務監察委員會（證監會），從事資產管理的持牌法團數目於2016年底為1,300間，按年增加近15%。根據《亞洲創業投資期刊》，2016年在香港的私募基金公司（包括證監會持牌法團及非證監會持牌法團）數目亦增加4.6%，至431間。迄今全球百大資產管理公司中有接近70間，以及內地二十大互惠基金公司中的大多數，已在香港設有業務或相聯公司。在香港駐設業務的機構投資者數目亦逐漸增加，其中作為全球第三大主權基金的阿布扎比投資局於10月宣布在香港成立海外辦事處，是該機構於阿布扎比以外設立的唯一辦事處。
mt_raw: The HKMA continues to promote Hong Kong as a centre for asset management. According to the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC), as of the end of 2016, there were approximately 1,300 licensed asset management firms, an increase of nearly 15% year-on-year. The Asia Private Equity Journal reported that the number of private equity firms in Hong Kong (including SFC-licensed and unlicensed firms) increased by 4.6% to 431 in 2016. Nearly 70 of the world’s top 100 asset management firms, and most among China’s top 20 mutual fund managers, have established operations or affiliated firms in Hong Kong. The number of institutional investors based in Hong Kong also steadily increased. Notably, the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority (ADIA), as the world’s third-largest sovereign fund, announced in October the establishment of an overseas office in Hong Kong, the only one outside Abu Dhabi.

src_raw: 2016年是充滿意外和黑天鵝事件的一年，環球金融市場出現大波動和震盪。2016年年初市場憂慮內地經濟硬着陸及全球增長放緩，促使環球股市大幅下挫。6月英國脫歐公投和11月美國大選結果亦出人意表。儘管投資環境困難，金管局在過去幾年已採取連串防禦措施，增強外匯基金的抗震能力，因此外匯基金在2016年仍錄得2% 的整體投資回報。
mt_raw: The year 2016 was filled with unexpected events and black swan events, with significant volatility and turbulence in the global financial markets. Early in 2016, concerns about a hard landing of Mainland China's economy and global growth slowdown led to sharp declines in global stock markets. The Brexit referendum in June and the U.S. presidential election in November also produced surprising results. Despite a challenging investment environment, the HKMA has adopted a series of defensive measures in recent years to enhance the resilience of the Exchange Fund; as a result, the Exchange Fund still achieved an overall investment return of 2% in 2016.

src_raw: 根據《外匯基金條例》，外匯基金的首要目的是直接或間接影響港元匯價，亦可運用於保持香港貨幣及金融體系穩定健全，藉此保持香港作為國際金融中心的地位。外匯基金由財政司司長掌有控制權，並投資於其經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後認為合適的證券或其他資產。
mt_raw: Under the Exchange Fund Ordinance, the primary purpose of the Exchange Fund is to directly or indirectly influence the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate, as well as to be used to maintain the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial systems, thereby preserving Hong Kong's position as an international financial centre. The Exchange Fund is under the control of the Financial Secretary and invests in securities or other assets deemed appropriate following advice from the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee.

src_raw:
外匯基金諮詢委員會為外匯基金制定下列投資目標：
(a) 保障資本；
(b) 確保整體貨幣基礎在任何時候都由流通性極高的美元資產提供十足支持；
(c) 確保流動資金足以維持貨幣及金融穩定；以及
(d) 在符合上述(a)至(c)項的前提下盡量爭取投資回報，以保障基金的長期購買力。

src_raw: 外匯基金大致上分成兩個主要組合：支持組合及投資組合。支持組合持有流通性極高的美元資產，按照貨幣發行局制度的規定為貨幣基礎提供十足支持。投資組合主要投資於經濟合作與發展組織成員國的債市及股市，以保障資產的價值及長期購買力。這兩個組合整體債券與股票的長線目標分布比率為71比29。以目標貨幣比重計，91%的資產分配予美元及港元，其餘9%分配予其他貨幣。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund is roughly divided into two main portfolios: the Support Portfolio and the Investment Portfolio. The Support Portfolio holds highly liquid USD assets, providing full backing to the monetary base in accordance with the currency issuance system. The Investment Portfolio primarily invests in government bonds and equities of member countries of the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD), to safeguard asset value and long-term purchasing power. The overall long-term target distribution between bonds and equities for these two portfolios is 71:29. In terms of the target currency distribution, 91% of assets are allocated to USD and HKD, with the remaining 9% to other currencies.

src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產分散投資至較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權，以及海外投資物業。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的市值上限為外匯基金累計盈餘的三分之一，但因應部分未來基金投放於長期資產，市值上限還有增加的空間。
mt_raw: To better manage risks and enhance medium- to long-term returns, the HKMA has gradually diversified part of the Exchange Fund’s assets into more varied asset classes—including emerging markets and Mainland China bonds and equities, private equity, and overseas real estate investments. Emerging markets and Mainland bonds and equities are held within the Investment Portfolio, while private equity and real estate are held within the Long-Term Growth Portfolio. The market value cap for the Long-Term Growth Portfolio is one-third of the accumulated surplus of the Exchange Fund, with room for further increases given future allocations to long-term assets.

src_raw: 外匯基金不時接受財政儲備、政府基金及法定組織的存款，利率一般與投資組合的表現掛鈎2，惟未來基金存款則除外。未來基金存款的利率與投資組合及長期增長組合的表現掛鈎，實際利率視乎組合比重而定。於2016年底，未來基金在投資組合與長期增長組合的比重為80：20。預期截至2018年底，未來基金存款中與長期增長組合掛鈎的部分會逐步增加至約50%。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund periodically receives deposits from the Fiscal Reserves, government funds, and statutory organizations, with interest rates generally linked to the performance of the investment portfolios, excluding future fund deposits. Future fund deposits’ interest rates are tied to the performance of the investment portfolios and the Long-Term Growth Portfolio, with actual rates depending on their respective weightings. As of the end of 2016, deposits linked to the investment portfolios and the Long-Term Growth Portfolio accounted for 80:20. It is expected that by the end of 2018, the portion linked to the Long-Term Growth Portfolio will gradually increase to approximately 50%.

terms: {'外匯基金': 'Exchange Fund', '戰略性偏離': 'tactical deviations', '戰略性資產分布': 'tactical asset allocation', '投資基準': 'investment benchmark', '投資程序': 'investment process', '投資組合經理': 'portfolio managers', '策略性資產分布': 'strategic asset allocation', '財政': 'financial discipline', '金管局': 'HKMA'}
src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產分布及戰略性資產分布作基礎。策略性資產分布，即投資基準反映的分布情況，顯示外匯基金為達到投資目標而可以作出的最佳長線資產分布。外匯基金以策略性分布作為指引，對資產進行戰略性分布，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際分布往往會與基準分布（亦即策略性分布）有所偏離，而實際與基準分布之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及戰略性偏離的限度，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產分布。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的限度內選持倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The investment procedures of the Exchange Fund are based on the Strategic Asset Allocation and the Tactical Asset Allocation. The Strategic Asset Allocation reflects the optimal long-term asset distribution for achieving the investment objectives, serving as the benchmark. The Exchange Fund uses this benchmark as a guideline and implements the Tactical Asset Allocation to aim for returns exceeding the benchmark. As a result, actual allocations often deviate from the benchmark—referred to as “strategic deviations.” After consulting the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, the Financial Secretary establishes the permissible limits for the benchmark and the deviations. The HKMA is authorized to determine the Strategic Asset Allocation. Portfolio managers may then select holdings within these limits, seeking to profit from short-term market fluctuations.

src_raw: 除透過內部職員管理資產外，金管局亦僱用外聘投資經理負責管理外匯基金約26%的資產，其中包括所有上市股票組合及其他特別資產。僱用外聘投資經理的目的，是要運用市場上最佳的專業投資技術為外匯基金投資，並讓外匯基金受惠於多元化的投資方式，以及讓內部專業人員汲取市場知識與資訊。
mt_raw: Aside from internal management, the HKMA also employs external investment managers responsible for about 26% of the assets, including all listed equity portfolios and other special assets. The purpose of hiring external managers is to leverage the best professional investment techniques in the market, benefiting from diversification and gaining market insights and information. Expenses related to external managers include fund management and custodian fees, transaction costs, withholding taxes, and other taxes, which vary annually depending on market conditions.

The HKMA also conducts detailed performance attribution analysis, striving to maximize the effective use of internal and external investment management expertise.

mt_raw: The HKMA supports the Principles on Responsible Ownership issued by the SFC on March 7, 2016. Regarding the management of the Exchange Fund, the HKMA encourages appointed external fund managers responsible for Hong Kong equity portfolios to adopt these Principles in their investment practices.

src_raw: 2016年環球金融市場出現大波動和震盪。股票市場方面，1月市場憂慮內地經濟硬着陸及全球增長放緩，促使香港及其他主要股市大幅下挫，直至2月中旬市場才穩定下來。6月英國脫歐公投及11月美國大選結果相繼出人意表，但股市在經歷短暫下挫後迅速收復失地。全年計，環球股市普遍表現理想。
mt_raw: The global financial markets experienced substantial volatility and turbulence in 2016. In equities, concerns over Mainland China’s economy and global growth caused major declines in Hong Kong and other major markets in January, stabilizing only by mid-February. The Brexit referendum in June and the U.S. presidential election in November produced unexpected outcomes, but markets recovered quickly after brief dips. Overall, global equity markets performed well for the year.

src_raw: 債券市場方面，第1季商品價格進一步下跌加深市場對全球增長放緩及低通脹的憂慮，加上第2季英國脫歐公投帶來的不明朗因素及市場對中央銀行維持寬鬆政策的預期，加大了市場對安全資產的需求，支持政府債市於2016年上半年有不俗表現。其中10年期美國國庫券收益率在7月跌至1.36%的歷史低位。然而，在下半年由於市場對美國加息的預期升溫，尤其在美國總統選舉後，美國國庫券收益率飆升。其他主要政府債券的收益率亦上升，但升幅較小。
mt_raw: In bonds, commodity prices fell further in the first quarter, deepening market fears of slow growth and low inflation. The second quarter saw uncertainties from the Brexit vote and expectations for sustained loose monetary policies by central banks, which supported government bonds in the first half of 2016. The 10-year U.S. Treasury yield dropped to a historic low of 1.36% in July. However, in the second half, expectations of U.S. rate hikes increased, especially after the U.S. presidential election, causing yields to surge. Yields on other major government bonds rose too, but to a lesser extent.

src_raw: 貨幣市場方面，美元在2016年繼續走強，美元匯價指數升至14年來的高位。美元持續強勢，是受到美元與其他主要貨幣的利率差距擴大所支持。雖然日圓兌美元於2016年上升約3%，歐元兌美元下跌約3%。在英國脫歐公投結果帶來的不明朗因素持續困擾下，英鎊兌美元於年內亦下跌16%，是自2008年以來的最大跌幅。
mt_raw: In the currency markets, the US dollar continued to strengthen, with the USD index reaching a 14-year high. The dollar’s strength was driven by wider interest rate differentials with other major currencies. The Japanese yen appreciated about 3% against the dollar, while the euro depreciated roughly 3%. Amid ongoing uncertainty following the Brexit vote, the British pound against the dollar fell 16% for the year, its largest decline since 2008.

terms: {'外匯估值下調': 'currency translation effect', '外匯基金': 'Exchange Fund', '投資收入': 'investment income', '策略性資產組合': 'strategic portfolio', '香港': 'Hong Kong'}
src_raw: 儘管金融市場大幅波動，外匯基金在2016年仍錄得681億港元投資收入，包括外地股票收益286億港元、香港股票收益53億港元、債券收益331億港元、外匯基金投資控股附屬公司持有的其他投資收益169億港元，以及非港元資產外匯估值下調158億港元。由於去年美元匯價急升，外匯基金非美元投資轉作港元時無可避免出現外匯估值下調。另一方面，策略性資產組合錄得7億港元估值虧損。
mt_raw: Despite significant market volatility, the Exchange Fund achieved an investment income of HK$68.1 billion in 2016, including HK$28.6 billion from foreign equities, HK$5.3 billion from Hong Kong equities, HK$33.1 billion from bonds, HK$16.9 billion from other investments held by subsidiaries of the Exchange Fund, and an unrealized valuation loss of HK$15.8 billion on non-HKD assets due to exchange rate depreciation. The sharp appreciation of the US dollar last year resulted in unavoidable exchange valuation losses when non-USD assets were converted to HKD. Conversely, the Support Portfolio recorded valuation losses of HK$700 million.

src_raw: 於2016年年底，外匯基金的資產總額達36,187億港元。長期增長組合投資的市值總計1,818億港元，當中包括私募股權1,168億港元及房地產650億港元，已承擔但尚未提取作投資的總額為1,338億港元。
mt_raw: As of the end of 2016, the total assets of the Exchange Fund amounted to HK$3,618.7 billion. The market value of investments in the Long-Term Growth Portfolio reached HK$181.8 billion, including private equity at HK$116.8 billion and real estate at HK$65 billion. The total unrealized but not yet invested amount was HK$133.8 billion.

src_raw: 由於外圍投資環境持續惡化，過去幾年金管局已作出一系列防禦部署，包括縮短債券組合年期、增持現金及大幅減持非美元及非港元資產。我們亦加快多元化投資的步伐，特別是長期增長組合的投資。這些部署大大增強外匯基金的抗震能力。
mt_raw: Given the continuous deterioration of external investment environments, the HKMA has implemented a series of defensive measures in recent years, including shortening bond durations, increasing holdings of cash, and significantly reducing non-USD and non-HKD assets. Efforts to diversify investments have accelerated, especially within the Long-Term Growth Portfolio. These measures have substantially strengthened the resilience of the Exchange Fund.

src_raw: 金管局透過傳媒、公眾教育活動及其他各種渠道與社會和市場保持有效溝通，增進公眾對金管局政策及運作的了解。年內金管局繼續加強機構管治，包括推動員工提升專業能力、嚴格控制財政及加強資訊科技保安，以應付推行新措施和日益繁重的工作帶來的挑戰。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) maintains effective communication with society and the market through the media, public education activities, and various other channels to enhance public understanding of its policies and operations. Throughout the year, it issued 326 bilingual press releases and handled numerous media inquiries daily.

src_raw: 年內金管局成立兩個重要辦公室，即基建融資促進辦公室(IFFO)及金融科技促進辦公室(FFO)。為闡釋兩者的職能及工作計劃，金管局進行多項公共傳訊工作。此外，金管局舉辦傳媒簡介會及研討會，以加深公眾對金管局在普及金融、儲備管理、金融科技監管沙盒、網絡保安及中小企融資等多個範疇的運作和措施的認識。
mt_raw: In 2016, the HKMA established two important offices—the Infrastructure Financing Facilitation Office (IFFO) and the Fintech Facilitation Office (FFO). To clarify their functions and work plans, the HKMA carried out various public communication activities. Additionally, the HKMA held media briefings and seminars to deepen public understanding of its work in areas such as financial literacy, reserve management, fintech sandbox, cybersecurity, and SME financing.

src_raw: 公眾查詢服務是供市民查詢有關金管局職能及工作資訊的有效渠道。這項服務在2016年處理了10,170宗查詢，較2015年增加12%。查詢中約有一半涉及銀行業政策及規例、貨幣及經濟事項，以及銀行消費者事宜，特別是銀行產品及服務、硬幣收集計劃、銀行業相關指引及通告、儲值支付工具及零售支付系統、打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集活動，以及物業按揭貸款的審慎監管措施。
mt_raw: The Public Enquiry Service is an effective channel for citizens to inquire about the HKMA’s functions and work information. In 2016, the service handled 10,170 inquiries, representing a 12% increase compared to 2015. About half of these inquiries related to banking policies and regulations, monetary and economic issues, and banking consumer matters, especially bank products and services, the coin collection scheme, banking-related guidelines and circulars, stored value facilities and retail payment systems, anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing activities, as well as prudential measures for mortgage loans.

mt_raw: The policy exhibition area in the HKMA Information Centre, which explains the HKMA’s work and introduces related financial knowledge, was renovated in the fourth quarter of 2016 to enrich its content and incorporate interactive elements. Notably, the redesign includes educational games to help visitors understand financial concepts in an engaging manner, along with multimedia touch screens providing a more comprehensive and in-depth introduction to HKMA’s work, aiming to offer visitors a new immersive experience. After the renovation, the Centre also features a mosaic artwork made from over 130,000 Hong Kong coins depicting Victoria Harbour. The new theme-based exhibition reopened on February 24, 2017, for public visits.

mt_raw: The HKMA’s official website (www.hkma.gov.hk) provides over 50,000 pages of information in English and traditional and simplified Chinese, offering convenient access to the latest updates. The website also hosts the “Register of Authorized Institutions’ Securities Staff” and the “Register of AIs and Local Representative Offices,” in accordance with Section 20 of the Banking Ordinance, as well as the “Register of Stored Value Facility Licenses” under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance. The site features special topic webpages and prominent quick links, alerting the public to new measures such as the regulation of stored value facilities, IFFO, and FFO, as well as important issues like phone scam prevention and the parking locations of banknote collection cash-in-and-out carts.
